scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run db:setup && concurrently -n api,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.db:setup: npm --workspace=packages/db run generate && npm --workspace=packages/db run db:push
scripts.build: npm --workspace=apps/api run build && npm --workspace=apps/client run build
